Work With Us

Our Story

About Fluke

We're a small but mighty indie game studio focused on crafting games, worlds, and digital experiences that leave a lasting impression. Founded in 2023 and growing every day.

Our Mission

Fluke Game Studio was born out of a simple belief: that indie games can compete with the best in the world. We combine passion, craft, and relentless iteration to create experiences that resonate.

We don't just make games — we build worlds. Each project is approached with cinematic intention, game-feel obsession, and a commitment to delivering something truly special to the players who choose us.

Player First

Every decision is made with the player experience in mind.

Passion Driven

We build games we'd want to play ourselves.

Quality over Quantity

Fewer, better games. Crafted with care.

Community

We listen to players and build with them, not just for them.

The Crew

Meet the Team

Alex Rivera

Founder & Game Director

Visionary behind Fluke Game Studio. 8+ years in indie game development with a passion for immersive worlds.

Game DesignUnityUnrealTeam Leadership

Maya Chen

Lead Artist & 3D Designer

Creates the stunning visuals and 3D assets that define Fluke's visual identity.

3D ModelingBlenderSubstance PainterConcept Art

Jordan Blake

Lead Developer

Full-stack game developer specializing in Unity, Unreal, and multiplayer systems.

UnityUnreal Engine 5C#Networking

Sam Park

Sound Designer & Composer

Crafts the immersive audio landscapes and original soundtracks for Fluke's productions.

Sound DesignCompositionFMODWwise

We're always looking for talented people who share our passion.
